name: Mombasa Coastal Flood Risk Management Plan
blocking_factor: Not gazetted — awaiting County CIDP integration
notes: Comprehensive plan drafted with World Bank support. Covers sea-level rise scenarios to 2050. Not adopted. Coastal land speculation interests blocking zoning changes.

name: Likoni Ferry Corridor Drainage
blocking_factor: Land acquisition in dense peri-urban corridor
notes: Design complete 2020. Drainage alignment requires demolition of 340 structures. Compensation budget inadequate.

name: Tudor Creek Riparian Buffer Enforcement
blocking_factor: High commercial value of creek-front land
notes: Buffer mapped. Reclamation and construction within buffer ongoing. Three NEMA enforcement orders since 2019; none executed. KPA has jurisdiction over sections that conflict with NEMA.

name: Kisauni Stormwater Drainage Network
notes: Phase 1 (Bamburi–Shanzu) 60% complete. Phase 2 not procured. 2022 contractor default set back Phase 1 by 18 months.

name: Coastal Early Warning System (Sea Level + Rainfall)
blocking_factor: Inter-agency MOU between KMD and county not signed
notes: Design complete. Combines tidal gauge with rainfall data for 12-hour compound flood warning. MOU negotiation stalled over data ownership.

name: Mwache Dam Flood Release Protocol
notes: Protocol for controlled Mwache dam releases during heavy rainfall established 2018. Downstream communities notified via sub-chief network. Effectiveness limited by communication gaps.

name: Likoni Sea Bund Rehabilitation
blocking_factor: Land ownership disputes on bund alignment
notes: 1.8km of bund rehabilitated. 0.9km section stalled — private land claim obstructing construction for 6 years.

name: Port of Mombasa Climate Adaptation Plan
notes: Port-specific climate adaptation plan adopted. Elevated warehousing and drainage upgrades in Phase 1 container terminal. Residential areas around port not covered.
